mustAvoidClaims: Reporting style-only or equivalent refactor changes as material defects.
Using upstream PR titles, issue numbers, commit messages, or git history as evidence.
Relying on private repro.sh, gold-key.draft.json, or reference-fix.patch.
Claiming unrelated broad rewrites outside the proposed patch are required.

difficulty.rationale: Candidate should avoid hallucinating defects on a comment-only documentation wording patch.

candidateVisible: sanitized go-ethereum workspace at pinned revision
candidateForbidden: judge prompts, answer keys, run artifacts, and A/B mappings
upstream PR/issue text or commit message

approvedBy: local deterministic OSS no-issue control authoring
GPT-5.5 high provider no-issue review: APPROVE
approval.notes: Provider review approved this no-issue control; treat style/doc/perf nits as non-material false positives for precision scoring.
